owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.nodeId: The node to compute power for.

QUORUM_BPS().notice: Quorum: 10% of total registered node count must vote.

cancel(uint256).notice: Cancel a proposal. Only proposer or owner.

execute(uint256).notice: Execute a queued proposal after its timelock.

finalize(uint256).notice: Finalize voting and queue for execution if passed.

reputation(bytes32).notice: Reputation scores (set by owner, represents on-chain track record).

setReputation(bytes32,uint256).notice: Set reputation score for a node. Owner only.

vote(uint256,bool).notice: Vote on a proposal. Power = sqrt(stake) * trustScore * (1 + log2(reputation)).

votingPower(bytes32).notice: Compute voting power: sqrt(stake) * trustScore * (1 + log2(reputation)).
